channel.title: Geek on istvn.urbn
channel.description: Recent content in Geek on istvn.urbn

item.title: platform of choice
item.description: After tinkering way too much with the backbone of my blog, I’m going to have to find new reasons not to post.

item.title: system upgrade
item.description: After seven years, my MacBook Pro was starting to feel slow. By switching to M1, I might actually gain speed.
